title: Incident Response in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger incident response in practice judgment so legal / risk work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Incident Response in Practice is a leverage point inside legal / risk. It supports the broader goal of contracts, ip, privacy, liabilities, and regulatory awareness.
coreConcepts: Incident Response in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good incident response in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Incident Response in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
